ddls:
CREATE TABLE "daily_cases" (
  "case_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each daily case record */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the report */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state/union territory where the data was collected */,
  "confirmed_indian" INTEGER /* Number of confirmed cases of Indian nationals */,
  "confirmed_foreign" INTEGER /* Number of confirmed cases of foreign nationals */,
  "cured" INTEGER /* Number of cured cases */,
  "deaths" INTEGER /* Number of deaths */,
  "test_conducted" INTEGER /* Number of tests conducted */,
  "test_positive_rate" TEXT /* Percentage of positive cases out of total tests */,
  "recovery_rate" TEXT /* Percentage of recovered cases out of total confirmed cases */,
  "fatality_rate" TEXT /* Percentage of deaths out of total confirmed cases */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("case_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_daily_cases_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "states" (
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each state/union territory */,
  "state_name" TEXT /* Name of the state/union territory */,
  "state_code" TEXT /* Code of the state/union territory */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the state/union territory */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Estimated population of the state/union territory */,
  "area" TEXT /* Area of the state/union territory in square kilometers */,
  "capital_city" TEXT /* Capital city of the state/union territory */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., health official, data analyst, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for secure authentication */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "case_id" INTEGER /* ID of the case record being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the case record */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the case record was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user's device */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent of the user's device */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_case_id FOREIGN KEY ("case_id") REFERENCES daily_cases ("case_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vaccinations" (
  "vaccination_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vaccination record */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the vaccination report */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state/union territory where the data was collected */,
  "total_vaccinated" INTEGER /* Total number of people vaccinated */,
  "first_dose" INTEGER /* Number of people who received the first dose */,
  "second_dose" INTEGER /* Number of people who received the second dose */,
  "booster_dose" INTEGER /* Number of people who received the booster dose */,
  "vaccine_type" TEXT /* Type of vaccine used (e.g., Covishield, Covaxin) */,
  "manufacturers" TEXT /* Manufacturers of the vaccines used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vaccination_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vaccinations_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hospital_capacity" (
  "capacity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each hospital capacity record */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the report */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state/union territory where the data was collected */,
  "total_beds" INTEGER /* Total number of beds available */,
  "occupied_beds" INTEGER /* Number of beds currently occupied */,
  "icu_beds" INTEGER /* Total number of ICU beds available */,
  "occupied_icu_beds" INTEGER /* Number of ICU beds currently occupied */,
  "ventilators" INTEGER /* Total number of ventilators available */,
  "occupied_ventilators" INTEGER /* Number of ventilators currently occupied */,
  "oxygen_supply" INTEGER /* Available oxygen supply in liters per minute */,
  "available_ambulances" INTEGER /* Number of ambulances available */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("capacity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hospital_capacity_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "public_health_measures" (
  "measure_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each public health measure */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the measure implementation */,
  "state_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the state/union territory where the measure was implemented */,
  "measure_type" TEXT /* Type of the measure (e.g., lockdown, mask mandate) */,
  "measure_description" TEXT /* Description of the measure */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the measure */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the measure */,
  "enforcement" TEXT /* Enforcement mechanism (e.g., fines, penalties) */,
  "compliance_rate" TEXT /* Compliance rate of the population */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("measure_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_public_health_measures_state_id FOREIGN KEY ("state_id") REFERENCES states ("state_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data version record */,
  "table_name" TEXT /* Name of the table where the data was updated */,
  "record_id" INTEGER /* ID of the record that was updated */,
  "column_name" TEXT /* Name of the column that was updated */,
  "old_value" TEXT /* Old value of the column */,
  "new_value" TEXT /* New value of the column */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Timestamp of the update */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who made the update */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_versions_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
